allow: Bash(node -e "const l=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const pkgs=['expo','react-native','react-native-reanimated','react-native-worklets']; pkgs.forEach\(p=>{ const v=l.packages?.['node_modules/'+p]?.version; console.log\(p+':', v||'NOT FOUND'\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); const keys=['expo','react-native','react-native-reanimated','react-native-worklets','react']; keys.forEach\(k=>console.log\(k+':', p.dependencies[k]||'not found'\)\)")
